user: what time is it in tokyo right now
content:
I can see you're on a New Tab page. I don't have access to real-time clock information from the browser, but I can tell you that Tokyo is in the Japan Standard Time (JST) timezone, which is UTC+9.

To get the current time in Tokyo, you can:
1. Check your device's world clock (most phones/computers have this feature)
2. Search "current time in Tokyo" in a search engine
3. Use a time zone converter website
